header.announcement: Hare Krishna — Sri Sri Radha Murlidhar Mandir, Bhusawal

hero.label: Sri Sri Radha Murlidhar Mandir — Bhusawal
hero.mantra: Hare Krishna Hare Krishna · Krishna Krishna Hare Hare

services.label: What We Offer
services.prasadam_desc: Sanctified vegetarian food distributed after every program.
services.gita_desc: Weekly classes explaining the timeless wisdom of the Gita.
services.kirtan_desc: Congregational chanting of the Hare Krishna maha-mantra.
services.youth_desc: Structured spiritual programs for students and young adults.

donation_cta.label: Support the Mission
donation_cta.title: Contribute to the New Temple Construction
donation_cta.desc: Every contribution — small or large — is an act of devotion and a step toward creating a permanent home for Sri Sri Radha Murlidhar.

temple_intro.label: About the Temple
temple_intro.title: Vrindavan in Bhusawal
temple_intro.desc: Sri Sri Radha Murlidhar Mandir is a sacred space where devotees experience the joy of Krishna consciousness through kirtan, spiritual classes, and loving community service.
temple_intro.feature1_desc: A magnificent new temple dedicated to Sri Sri Radha Murlidhar is rising in Bhusawal — a sanctuary of devotion, peace, and divine beauty.
temple_intro.feature2_desc: Explore the depth of Bhagavad-Gita and Srimad Bhagavatam through guided courses, satsangs, and personal mentorship.
temple_intro.feature3_desc: The ISKCON Youth Service nurtures spiritual values and discipline in the next generation through engaging and transformative programs.

timings.label: Daily Schedule
timings.title: Temple Aarti Timings
timings.desc1: The daily aarti schedule at Sri Sri Radha Murlidhar Mandir marks the rhythm of devotional life. Each ceremony is an opportunity to receive the Lord's darshan and offer your heart in service.
timings.desc2: All are welcome to attend any aarti. The temple is open from 4:30 AM to 1:00 PM and 4:00 PM to 9:00 PM daily.

footer.address: Near Roop Darshan Photo Studio, Bhusawal, Maharashtra 425201
footer.mantra: Hare Krishna · Hare Krishna · Krishna Krishna · Hare Hare

programs.title: Bhagavad Gita Class
programs.desc: Deep discussion on the teachings of Bhagavad Gita, followed by Q&A, kirtan, and mahaprasad.

programs.title: Youth Boys Meetup
programs.desc: A special interactive session for students and young professionals focused on spirituality and self-growth.

programs.title: Chetna Program
programs.desc: A devotional session designed for women and girls, focused on self-improvement and bhakti.

programs.title: Bhagavatam Class & Sunday Feast
programs.desc: Insightful discourse on Srimad Bhagavatam followed by kirtan and the celebrated Sunday prasadam.

programs.title: Gopal Fun School
programs.desc: Spiritual education for children through engaging stories, devotional songs, and creative activities.
